message:
feat(abi): promote netgroup family from host delegation to native

Replace 4 host-delegated symbols with native implementations:
- setnetgrent — reads /etc/netgroup and pre-parses all triples for the
  specified group into a thread-local vector
- endnetgrent — clears the pre-parsed triples
- getnetgrent — iterates pre-parsed triples, packing host/user/domain
  into thread-local buffer
- getnetgrent_r — reentrant variant using caller-supplied buffer

Host delegation count in unistd_abi.rs: 12 → 8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
